coding conventions
--
prefer camel_case for varible names, function names, and file names. CamelCase for classes only.
use clarifying code instead of comments, well named constants, enums, etc.
prefer const over #define

Notes
--
The user should run Platformio commands, do not run them yourself
Plans are in the plans folder, keep them up to date


Prefer brevity in all documents

keep README.md up to doate
